calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2004 Continued To Dec-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dilip M. Patel, present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mariusz Pluder.
Exh. 1 - Threeday Notice dtd. 9-16-04--------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Mariusz Pluder as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 310 Columbus Ave., #232, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $2,910.00
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs per cost bill.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DILIP PATEL IN PRO PER
NON APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARIUSZ LPUDER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN.
TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED(218)
